title: Machine Account Subtype Approval Config
description: Configuration details for machine account subtype approval, including creation and deletion approval requirements, approver lists, form and entitlement references, and approval status options.

approvers.description:
Comma separated string of approvers.

Following are the options for approver types: manager, sourceOwner, accountOwner, workgroup:[workgroupId] (Governance group).

Approval request will be assigned based on the order of the approvers passed.

Multiple workgroups(governance groups) can be selected as an approver.

>**Note:** accountOwner approver type is only for machine account delete approval settings.

comments.description:
Comment configurations for the approval request.

Following are the options for comments: ALL, OFF, APPROVAL, REJECT.

subtypeId.description: Unique identifier representing the specific subtype of the machine account. This is read-only.

machineAccountCreate.description: Configuration options for machine account creation.

accountCreateEnabled.description: Specifies if the creation of machine accounts is allowed for this subtype.

approvalRequired.description: Specifies if approval is required for machine account creation requests for this subtype.

formId.description: Id of the form linked to subtype. This is read-only.

entitlementId.description: Id of the system created entitlement upon enabling account creation for this subtype. This is read-only.

passwordSetting.description: This is required before enabling the account creation to true. Default value will be null.

passwordAttribute.description: Name of the account attribute from the source's schema or new custom attribute to use when password settings is enabled.

machineAccountDelete.description: Configuration options for machine account deletion.

approvalRequired.description: Indicates whether approval is required for an account deletion request.
